#+title: Zettelkasten
#+filetags: :pkm:

A note-taking method built on small, densely linked notes.
Popularized by Niklas Luhmann; implemented for me by
[[id:44444444-4444-4444-8444-444444444444][org-roam]].

Key ideas:

1. one idea per note
2. link liberally
3. write in your own words
